history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D. Moving forward would go to row 02 column C, which is lava, so that is unsafe. I should turn to face down first, then I can move toward the goal through safe floor cells.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 02 column B facing down (`v`). The cell directly ahead at row 03 column B is safe floor, and moving there brings me closer to the goal at row 04 column D. I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down (`v`). The cell ahead at row 04 column B is safe, but the goal is to the right at row 04 column D. Since I can only move forward after turning, I need to first rotate clockwise to face left? No, to head toward the goal from here I should turn counter-clockwise from down to right? Actually from down (`v`), counter-clockwise turns me to right (`>`), which lets me move toward the goal. So I will turn counter-clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing right (`>`). The cell directly ahead at row 03 column C is lava, so I must not move forward. The goal is below-right at row 04 column D, so the safe way to progress is to turn clockwise to face down (`v`), which lets me move to the safe cell at row 04 column B next.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down (`v`). The cell ahead at row 04 column B is safe, and moving there brings me closer to the goal at row 04 column D. So I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down (`v`). The cell in front at row 05 column B is a wall, so I cannot go forward. The goal is to my right at row 04 column D, and I need to turn to face right. From facing down, turning counter-clockwise makes me face right? Actually from down, clockwise turns left and counter-clockwise turns right, so I should turn counter-clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D, and the cell in front at row 04 column C is safe (`.`). I should move forward toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column C facing right (`>`). The goal is immediately ahead at row 04 column D, and that cell is safe (`O`). I should move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
